section.heading: Risk management training

content.p: The Council shall develop and administer training seminars in risk management for its employees and the employees of insured financial institutions.

subsection.heading: Study of risk management training program
subsection.chapeau: Not later than end of the 1-year period beginning on August 9, 1989, the Council shall—

paragraph.content: conduct a study on the feasibility and appropriateness of establishing a formalized risk management training program designed to lead to the certification of Risk Management Analysts; and
report to the Congress the results of such study.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 95–630, title X, § 1009A, as added Pub. L. 101–73, title XII, § 1218, Aug. 9, 1989, 103 Stat. 546.)
